Travel What do I need to know before I travel abroad? What do I need to know before I travel abroad? You can find answers to common questions about travelling – like the availability of ATMs, emergency services and how to get help when you’re abroad – in Travel Support . If you have questions about whether or not you need to inform your issuer that you’re travelling and using your Visa card overseas, please refer to your card issuer’s site. I’m travelling and my card has been damaged. I’m travelling and my card has been damaged. If your card is lost, stolen, damaged or compromised, we will work with your financial institution to approve and expedite the delivery of an emergency card to you, usually within 1 to 3 days. For help, call us on the USA freephone number (+1 800 847 2911) or use one of our global freephone numbers from the drop-down menu above.
